features: RESTORES NORMAL DIGESTIVE FUNCTION - Support proper intestinal function with our dog digestive paste. This upset tummy relief for dogs contains Montmorillonite, Na+ Mg2+ and K+ ions, dextrose, and prebiotics which help quickly restore normal digestive function and firm stools. Our digestive aid for dog diarrhea will have your pet feeling great in no time.

BENEFICIAL PROBIOTICS FOR DOGS PASTE - This dog stomach settler maintains normal intestinal flora by promoting the growth of good bacteria like bifidobacterial and lactobacilli while lessening unwanted bacteria. By balancing the digestive flora, this dog stomach digestive aid is an effective dog stomach settler paste.

VETERINARY-GRADE DOG STOOL FIRMER - Logic Firm Paste adheres to the highest veterinary standards. The stomach settler for dogs is safe for pets to use for their gut health. Our veterinary-grade diarrhea aid for dogs coats and protects the intestinal lining and absorbs toxins whilst helping restore the electrolytes lost during diarrhoea.

EASY TO ADMINISTER PET PROBIOTICS - No need to worry about administering this dog upset stomach treatment to unruly or reluctant pets. The syringe makes it easy to get into their mouths for reliable diarrhea relief for dogs. Alternatively, you can squeeze the highly palatable dog paste on top of their food as a soothing tummy settler for dogs.

DIGESTIVE AID FOR DOGS - Logic Firm dog stool hardener helps settle their stomachs and improve digestive function. The dog probiotics also give them energy and promote their general well-being for a happy, healthy doggo. Our dog probiotic is available in two other sizes, small for dogs, puppies, cats and kittens, and medium for medium-sized dogs.
